step_rationale: Pro-inflammatory cytokine promoting endothelial injury and leukocyte infiltration.
mechanism: IL-16 promotes T-cell and eosinophil recruitment and contributes to endothelial activation, erosion, and inflammatory remodeling in acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: Novel biomarker panel measuring endothelial injury identifies patients at risk of coronary artery syndrome and discordance with low-density lipoprotein cholesterol.
